export class InventoryMessageParser{constructor(){this._items=[];}flush(){this._items=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const total=wrapper.readInt();const allowedTypes=['weapon','shield','potion','food','drink','tool','crop'// <-- added to align with server
];const allowedRarities=['common','uncommon','rare','epic','legendary'];for(let i=0;i<total;i++){const id=wrapper.readInt();// 1
const item_id=wrapper.readInt();// 2
const user_id=wrapper.readInt();// 3
const slot=wrapper.readInt();// 4
const quantity=wrapper.readInt();// 5
const durability=wrapper.readInt();// 6
const max_durability=wrapper.readInt();// 7 <-- NEW (must match server order)
const iconPath=wrapper.readString();// 8
const name=wrapper.readString();// 9
const item_type_raw=wrapper.readString();// 10
const item_type=allowedTypes.includes(item_type_raw)?item_type_raw:'tool';const rarityRaw=wrapper.readString();// 11
const rarity=allowedRarities.includes(rarityRaw)?rarityRaw:'common';const damage=wrapper.readInt();// 12
const defense=wrapper.readInt();// 13
const healing=wrapper.readInt();// 14
this._items.push({id,item_id,user_id,slot,quantity,durability,max_durability,icon_path:iconPath,name,item_type,rarity,stats:{damage,defense,healing}});}return true;}get items(){return this._items;}}
